zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Lathom II於1240年6月22日出生在英國斯塔福爾奧德利時，他的父親Robert de Lathom41歲，母親Lady Amicia de Alfreton40歲。他於1261年之前與Katherine Knowsley在英國爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1325年3月2日在英國藍卡爾可諾福斯利享年84歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾阿爾坦聖 加也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Lathom II于1240年6月22日出生在英国斯塔福爾奧德利时，他的父亲Robert de Lathom41岁，母亲Lady Amicia de Alfreton40岁。他于1261年之前与Katherine Knowsley在英国爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1325年3月2日在英国藍卡爾可諾福斯利享年84岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾阿爾坦聖 加也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lathom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Latham
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Lathom II was born on 22 June 1240, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, his father, Robert de Lathom, was 41 and his mother, Lady Amicia de Alfreton, was 40. He married Katherine Knowsley before 1261, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 2 March 1325, in Knowsley, Lancashire, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in St James' Church, Altham, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Lathom II est né le 22 juin 1240, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Lathom, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Amicia de Alfreton, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Knowsley avant 1261, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 2 mars 1325, à Knowsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à St James' Church, Altham, Lancashire, Angleterre.

Er hat vor 1261 in Cheshire, England Katherine Knowsley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 2. it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Lathom II è nato il il 22 giugno 1240 nel Audley, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Lathom, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Lady Amicia de Alfreton, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Knowsley prima del 1261, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 2 marzo 1325, nel Knowsley, Lancashire, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a St James' Church, Altham, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Lathom IIが1240年6月22日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーで生まれた時，父Robert de Lathomは41歳，母Lady Amicia de Alfretonは40歳であった。1261年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアでKatherine Knowsleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1325年3月2日にイギリスランカシュアイアノウスリーで84歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアアルサムスト ジャムス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St James' Church, Altham, Lancashire, En: 영국 랭카실르 알섬 스트 자메스' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Lathom II(이)가 1240년 6월 22일 영국 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Lathom(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Amicia de Alfreton(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1261년 이전 영국 체실르에서 Katherine Knowsley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1325년 3월 2일 영국 랭카실르 노우슬리에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 알섬 스트 자메스' c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.22 June 1240–2 March 1325: 22 de junho de 1240–2 de março de 1325
pt.St James' Church, Altham, Lancashire, En: St James' Church, Altham, Lancashire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Lathom II nasceu em 22 de junho de 1240, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Lathom, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Amicia de Alfreton, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Knowsley antes 1261, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de março de 1325, em Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em St James' Church, Altham, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.St James' Church, Altham, Lancashire, En: ст джемес' чурч, алтам, ланкашир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Lathom II родился 22 июня 1240 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Lathom было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Amicia de Alfreton, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Knowsley перед 1261 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 2 марта 1325 г. в местности ноусли, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности ст джемес' чурч, алтам, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Lathom II nació el 22 de junio de 1240, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Lathom, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Amicia de Alfreton, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Katherine Knowsley antes de 1261, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 2 de marzo de 1325, en Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en St James' Church, Altham, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
